hook.text: This DM is a scam. Here are the 4 tells.

body.text: The profile photo is stolen from a stock site.
They swear it's morning. Timestamps say 3am.
The link they sent was registered eleven days ago.
The message matches a known scam script, word for word.

cta.text: Scan before you reply. 5 free scans. No account needed.

voiceover.script: This DM is a scam. Four tells. Profile photo stolen from a stock site. Claims morning â timestamps say three a.m. The link was registered eleven days ago. Matches a known scam script, word for word. Scan before you reply. Five free scans. No account.

messages.text: Hey! I saw your post about side hustles. I made $12k last month with this one simple method.
I can show you everything. Just need you to sign up through my link. It's totally free to start.

evidence.label: Profile photo is stolen
evidence.detail: Reverse-image search matches a stock photography site. Not a real person.

evidence.label: Timestamps don't add up
evidence.detail: Claims it's morning, but messages sent at 3:11 AM local time.

evidence.label: Link registered 11 days ago
evidence.detail: bit.ly redirect leads to a domain created less than two weeks ago.

evidence.label: Known scam script match
evidence.detail: Message text matches a flagged template used in 240+ reported scam campaigns.
